sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) [“properly foam, so used perhaps Isa 30:27 hence fierceness,”] anger or indignation, especially the wrath of God as shown in the infliction of punishment; punishment sent from God (ὀργή), [“always in this sense, except Hos 7:16 ”], Isa 10:5, 25 Isa 10:25 26:20 30:27 Dan 8:19. בְּיֹום זַעַם in the day of (divine) indignation. Eze 22:24. Dan 11:36, עַד כָּלָה זַעַם “until the punishment sent from God be completed;” comp. Dan 8:19.

(2) rage, insolence. Hos 7:16, מִזַּעַם לְשֹׁונָם “because of the insolence of their tongue.”
